meaning: n.格莱美奖(美国镀金唱片奖,一年一度地奖励录音工业中有特别成就的奖,如奖给灌制唱片方面成绩卓著者的奖)
examples: Lamar was nominated for an album of the year Grammy.
It's worth the Grammy Award it won.
Grammy Award-winning artist Kelly Rowland performed at the event, hosted by actress and director Drew Barrymore.
Her music earned her four Dove Awards from the Gospel Music Association and two Grammy nominations.
